zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Jennings於1414年出生在英國賀特福爾時，她的父親Richard Jennings27歲，母親Mrs. Richard Jennings23歲。她於1439年與John Carpenter 'The Younger'在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年3月31日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年37歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Jennings于1414年出生在英国賀特福爾时，她的父亲Richard Jennings27岁，母亲Mrs. Richard Jennings23岁。她于1439年与John Carpenter 'The Younger'在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1451年3月31日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年37岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Jennings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Jenning , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
German: patronymic from a pet form (see Jenning ) of the personal name Johannes (see John ).

variants.name: Jenning
meanings: German: patronymic from a shortened form of the personal name Johann(es) (see John ).
English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Jenin, Janin, pet forms of John , with -in altered to -ing.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Jennings was born in 1414, in Hertfordshire, England, her father, Richard Jennings, was 27 and her mother, Mrs. Richard Jennings, was 23. She married John Carpenter 'The Younger' in 1439, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 31 March 1451, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Jennings est née en 1414, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Jennings, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard Jennings, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Carpenter 'The Younger' en 1439, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 31 mars 1451, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Jennings 1414 in Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Jennings 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Richard Jennings 23. Sie hat 1439 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom John Carpenter 'The Younger' geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 31. März 1451 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Jennings è nata il nel 1414 nel Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Richard Jennings, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Richard Jennings, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Carpenter 'The Younger' nel 1439, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 31 marzo 1451, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Jenningsが1414年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Jenningsは27歳，母Mrs. Richard Jenningsは23歳であった。1439年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでJohn Carpenter 'The Younger'と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1451年3月31日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで37歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Jennings(이)가 1414년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Jennings(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Richard Jennings(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 John Carpenter 'The Younger'(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 3월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Jennings nasceu em 1414, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Jennings, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard Jennings, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Carpenter 'The Younger' em 1439, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 31 de março de 1451, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Jennings родилась в 1414 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Jennings было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard Jennings, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Carpenter 'The Younger' в 1439 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 31 марта 1451 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Jennings nació en 1414, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Jennings, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs. Richard Jennings, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Carpenter 'The Younger' en 1439, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1451, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
